description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Catch2 Testing that runs on push to master, develop, actions_shared branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master and develop. Use an ubuntu-latest job that recursively checks out the repository, extracts the CoolProp version from CMakeLists.txt, creates a build directory, configures CMake with Release build type and shared library, builds the project, and runs tests with CatchTestRunner.
